build.beforeBuildCommand: node scripts/download-ffmpeg.js --optional && node scripts/generate-build-config.js && pnpm run build:tauri:frontend

security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1 http://localhost https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob: data:

bundle.longDescription: FMS Desktop application. Facility Management System with in-process API, SQLite database, and full desktop features.
